text.title: Qdrant — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step: bring up → collection → payload indexes → upsert → quantize → snapshot.

section.title: Step 1 — Run Qdrant
section.p: Docker: `docker run -p 6333:6333 -v $(pwd)/data:/qdrant/storage qdrant/qdrant`. Or Qdrant Cloud cluster with API key. Confirm `GET /readyz`.

section.title: Step 2 — Create collection with vector + HNSW config
section.p: `client.recreate_collection(collection_name, vectors_config=VectorParams(size=D, distance=Distance.COSINE), hnsw_config=HnswConfigDiff(m=16, ef_construct=128))`. Apply r1.

section.title: Step 3 — Create payload indexes
section.p: For every field that will appear in a `Filter`, call `create_payload_index(field, field_schema)`. Apply r2.

section.title: Step 4 — Batch upsert
section.p: `client.upsert(points=[PointStruct(id=..., vector=..., payload=...)], batch=512)`. Use named vectors for multi-modal points (r5).

section.title: Step 5 — Quantization decision
section.p: Benchmark recall@k before + after enabling quantization. Default: scalar Int8. Binary only when D≥1024 AND rescoring enabled. Apply r3.

section.title: Step 6 — Snapshot + verify
section.p: `snapshot_collection(collection_name)`. Restore-test on a staging Qdrant instance before declaring snapshot good. Apply r4 before any future schema change.
